summary: Tested unified VariantModal implementation across all pages. The global VariantModal (via VariantModalContext) is working correctly on ExplorePage, ExploreSeeAllPage, HivePage, ProfilePage (Collection/ISO tabs), and SearchPage. Modal shows album art, artist, title, variant label overlay, metadata badges, View Full Page button, and closes properly via X button or Escape key.
critical_code_review_comments: All pages (ExplorePage, ExploreSeeAllPage, HivePage, ProfilePage, SearchPage) correctly use openVariantModal from context
Old page-specific Dialog modals (trendingModal, albumModal, isoModal) have been successfully removed
Minor: There's a React warning about Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - already handled via sr-only span
context_for_next_testing_agent: The global VariantModal is rendered in App.js and uses VariantModalContext. To test: click any album artwork on ExplorePage(/nectar), HivePage(/hive), ProfilePage(/profile/{username}) Collection/ISO/Dreaming tabs, or SearchPage(/search). Modal should open with data-testid='variant-modal' containing variant-label-overlay and variant-modal-fullpage button.

test_results_detail.ExplorePage_trending: SUCCESS - VariantModal opens correctly with variant label
test_results_detail.HivePage_album_click: SUCCESS - VariantModal opens when clicking album in post
test_results_detail.ProfilePage_Collection: SUCCESS - VariantModal opens when clicking records in Collection tab
test_results_detail.ProfilePage_ISO: SUCCESS - VariantModal opens when clicking ISO items
test_results_detail.ProfilePage_Dreaming: NOT TESTED - No dreaming items in test user profile
test_results_detail.SearchPage: SUCCESS - VariantModal opens when clicking search results
test_results_detail.Modal_close_X_button: SUCCESS - Modal closes via X button
test_results_detail.Modal_close_Escape: SUCCESS - Modal closes via Escape key
